title: DelegationToken
description: Bundle that authorizes an agent_key to speak for a unique human within the Hearme scope. Integrity comes from the real zkPassport SNARK in zkpassport_proof, which is bound in-circuit to agent_key and yields the scope-bound unique_identifier (nullifier); the broker re-verifies the proof and validates every claim below against the verified outputs, so no separate signature wraps the bundle. See ARCHITECTURE.md §8.5. Canonical JSON serialization (sorted keys, no whitespace) is the input to delegation_hash = SHA-256(canonical_json(token)).

zkpassport_proof.description: base64 of canonical-JSON of the verifiable zkPassport bundle (see zkpassport.json): {version, proofs, query, queryResult, scope}. Re-verified by the broker via the zkpassport-bridge (real Noir/UltraHonk verification).

unique_identifier.description: zkPassport unique identifier (scope-bound nullifier). Stable per (passport, domain, scope).

disclosed_predicates.description: Predicate bundle derived from the verified proof's selective disclosure (§8.3). Reproduced deterministically by the bridge's disclosure mapping.

agent_key.description: base64 of the agent's Ed25519 public key (32 bytes). Bound into the proof via the SDK's custom_data; the proof attests this key speaks for unique_identifier.
